subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-19 in Los Angeles
subcodes.first_line: O my God! O my God! Verily, this is a servant of Thine, who did believe on Thee and in Thy signs
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for the departed, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
